positive: Minimalist geometric woodland creatures silhouette art, depicting a family of stylized woodland animals (deer, fox, owl) subtly integrated into an abstract leaf and branch pattern. The composition is centered and vertically balanced, using strong black negative space against a soft cream background. Focus on clean, elegant line work and crisp, solid silhouettes. Stylized nature core, Scandinavian aesthetic, high contrast, vector art style, suitable for apparel repeat print, deep depth of field, natural sunlight, highly detailed, digital painting, ultra clean lines, perfect symmetry.
negative: blurry, out of focus, noise, grain, watermark, text, logo, trademark, copyright, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, disfigured, mutated, low resolution, low detail, cluttered, dirty, bright colors, photorealism
